title: [YTPMV] - Franz Harkinand - Do Ya Wanna (remastered)
description:
MP3 download (4.94MB): http://www.mediafire.com/?fb42mv9ou3l23jb

Please note that most of the art used in this video is not made by me. If you feel you want to be given credit right here, go ahead and PM me. Once again I am really grateful for all the wonderful drawings and mashups.
---
I've always wanted to change that midi track into actual music, but this was difficult, as the new track had unpredictably variable tempo. I had to adjust all the words manually - and then I thought it might be nice if I updated the video.
So I opened that project from 2009. I replaced all the missing and low-quality graphics, which also created the need for re-keyframing. I moved from chroma keying to masking and fixed all the bugs that occured. Then, I added a few filters and what might have taken an hour has eventually evolved into a project I've been working on for the recent week.
I hope this will allow you to rediscover this SMPKF, since this is the way I wanted it to sound like almost 3 years ago.

Also, did you know that out of nearly 5000 subscribers less than 900 came to see that Gwonam video? I'm touched that in the day when people just tramp over old poopers like me, those 900 still remembered about ol' Moto...
